description: Expected results for forbidden index in DataClean test

expected_messages.description: DataClean with non-states index dropped silently (no response expected)
Valid DataValue queued for bulk indexing (no response expected)
End must yield end_ack(Status_Ok) - the valid DataValue is indexed and the bad DataClean was filtered out

validation_rules.session_consistency: All messages share the same session ID
validation_rules.response_format: Final end_ack must be Status_Ok; the filter must NOT abort the session
